[[reply_to_current]] To approve Telegram pairing using the setup code G8PH4KK5, please run the pairing command on your OpenClaw host or in the terminal where OpenClaw is running. If you intended for me to execute a specific command, let me know—otherwise, this is your next step:

```sh
openclaw pairing approve telegram G8PH4KK5
```

This will approve the Telegram connection for the session requesting pairing with code G8PH4KK5. If you see any errors or need a hand, just let me know!
